rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to art. VIII, §7-b, which governs dedication of federal roadway reimbursement revenues. No conflict exists.
quote: All revenues received from the federal government as reimbursement for state expenditures of funds that are themselves dedicated for acquiring rights-of-way and constructing, maintaining, and policing public roadways are also constitutionally dedicated and shall be used only for those purposes.
_note: Rule text concerns federal reimbursement for roadways; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
